offer: For insurance brokers processing 10-20 policies/month, missed policy renewals cause client dissatisfaction. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflow solutions
DM outreach to insurance brokers with demo video
Join community forums for insurance tools discussions

pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
